tips.title: Helpful Financing Tips
tips.tip1Content1: Your monthly car payment is primarily determined by three factors:
tips.tip1L1: Loan Amount: The car price minus your down payment.
tips.tip1L2: Interest Rate: The percentage a bank charges for lending you money. Lower is better.
tips.tip1L3: Loan Term: How long you take to pay back the loan. Longer terms mean lower monthly payments but more total interest paid over time.
tips.tip2Content1: In Malaysia, car loan interest rates (hire purchase) typically operate on a flat rate basis and range from 2.5% to 4.5% for new cars, and 3.0% to 8.0% for used cars, depending on:
tips.tip2L4: The loan tenure (longer loans sometimes have higher rates)
tips.tip3Title: Benefits of a larger down payment
tips.tip3Content1: While the minimum down payment in Malaysia is usually 10%, putting down more upfront has several major benefits:
tips.tip3L1: Lower Monthly Installment: Reduces your monthly financial burden.
tips.tip3L2: Less Interest Paid: You borrow less, meaning you pay less total interest over the life of the loan.
tips.tip3L3: Better Approval Odds: Banks view you as a lower-risk borrower.
tips.tip3L4: Avoid Being 'Under Water': Protects you from owing more than the car is worth as it depreciates.
tips.tip4Content1: Malaysian car loans typically range from 5 to 9 years (60 to 108 months).
tips.tip4Content3: Higher monthly payments, but you pay off the car faster and save thousands in total interest.
tips.tip4Content5: Lower, more manageable monthly payments, but you will pay significantly more in total interest over the loan's lifetime.

waitlist.badge: Waitlist Now Open — Limited Early Spots
waitlist.headline: Built for Malaysian Car Salespeople
waitlist.heroBody: Stop paying listing fees. Stop losing leads in your DMs. Stop flying blind. ShiftOS gives solo salespeople the same tools big dealerships have — for free.
waitlist.feat1Sub: Unlimited. No expiry. No credit needed.
waitlist.feat3Sub: Pipeline board, follow-up reminders, close rate stats.
waitlist.formSub: No credit card. No commitment. Just early access.
waitlist.refBadge: Referred by a friend — you're on the fast lane.
waitlist.consentLabel: I agree to be added to the ShiftOS WhatsApp broadcast channel to receive launch updates, new features, and exclusive early-member offers.
waitlist.noSpam: No spam. You'll be notified when we launch.
waitlist.errorConsent: Please accept the consent to continue.
waitlist.confirmAlreadyBody: You're already on the waitlist. Here's your referral link — share it to move up.
waitlist.confirmBody: on the waitlist. Share your referral link and move up the queue.
waitlist.waShareMsg: Hey, there's a new platform for car salespeople — free listings, your own profile, lead tracking all in one. Join the waitlist:
waitlist.foundingNudge: Refer 1 friend and unlock Founding Member status — first access, lifetime perks.
waitlist.painSectionEyebrow: The daily grind nobody talks about
waitlist.painSectionHeadline: What's costing you sales right now
waitlist.painSectionBody: Every day you use the old way, you're leaving money on the table. Here's the math.
waitlist.pain1: Pay RM 30–200 per listing just to stay visible. Listings expire. You re-post. You pay again. Every. Month.
waitlist.gain1: ShiftOS Lite is 100% free — list as many cars as you want, forever.
waitlist.pain2: Leads come in from 5 different places. No tracking. You forget to follow up. The buyer buys from someone else.
waitlist.gain2: Every enquiry auto-converts to a tracked lead. Set reminders. Never ghost a buyer again.
waitlist.pain3: You spend years building a name but you have no storefront. No profile. No link to share. Buyers can't find you.
waitlist.gain3: Your own xdrive.my/s/yourname profile — share it on TikTok, IG, WhatsApp. Buyers see ALL your cars in one place.
waitlist.pain4: You have no idea which cars get the most views, which leads are hot, or why deals fall through.
waitlist.gain4: Analytics on every listing. CVR, views, WA taps, pipeline stage — know exactly what to push.
waitlist.pain5: Dealer wants you to use their system. You want your own. There's no middle ground.
waitlist.gain5: Start free as a solo agent. One invite code and you merge under a dealer — keeping your track record.
waitlist.ctaBottomBody: Join Malaysian car salespeople who are done with listing fees, ghost leads, and zero visibility. ShiftOS is built for you — and it's free.
waitlist.footerText: © {year} ShiftOS · xdrive.my · Built for Malaysian car salespeople
